ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the commodity's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the variety belongs to */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the variety */,
  "crop_season" TEXT /* Typical crop season for the variety */,
  "yield" REAL /* Average yield of the variety */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the variety's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the market */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the market */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the market's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the price was recorded */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the price belongs to */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety the price belongs to */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the commodity variety in the market */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the commodity variety in the market */,
  "modal_price" REAL /* Modal price of the commodity variety in the market */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the commodity variety traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, trader, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the forecast is for */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the forecast is for */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the commodity variety in the market */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the trend is for */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the trend is for */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety the trend is for */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was analyzed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the alert is for */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the alert is for */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety the alert is for */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the alert */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the price data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price data that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the price data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was last recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)
